title: Smoky LowCal Venezuelan Mars Bar Crumble
description: A playful, smoky crumble that blends the sweetness of a Mars bar with tangy pickles, all wrapped in lowcalorie puffed rice and a hint of smoked paprika-perfect for kids and nutritionconscious parents alike.
instructions: Finely chop the Mars bar into small cubes.
Toast the puffed rice cereal in a dry skillet over medium heat for 4–5 minutes, stirring frequently until lightly golden.
Melt the coconut oil in a small saucepan or microwave, then stir in the smoked paprika, smoked salt, and honey until well combined.
In a large bowl, combine the toasted cereal, coconut oil mixture, chopped pickles, and Mars bar cubes.
Transfer the mixture to a greased 8‑inch square baking dish, pressing lightly to create an even layer.
Bake in the preheated oven for 8–10 minutes, until the crumble is sticky and the edges are slightly crisp.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for 2 minutes before sprinkling with chopped parsley.
Serve warm as a crunchy, smoky dessert or an indulgent snack.
Enjoy immediately for the best texture.
